title: Easy Monster Spawner
description: This adds a recipe for the Monster Spawner.
body:
Do you want a way to craft the monster spawner without having to use Creative Mode?

Now you can with this mod.

This adds a recipe to the game by using hostile mob drops:
- Rotten Flesh
- String
- Bone
- Gunpowder
